        if tGameOption_TC.sbutton then tc.setupButton(true) end -- Create setup button?
    end

    -- Table-related tasks if setup has been triggered
    if vType == "Setup-Done" then

        -- No code

    end

    -- Table-related setup tasks *before* setup code routine
    if vType == "Pre-Setup" then
        if tGameOption_TC.sboard then tc.setupBoard(false) end -- Destroy setup board?
        if tGameOption_TC.sbutton then tc.setupButton(false) end -- Destroy setup button?
        if Util.get(gClearTableButton_TC) then tc.del("SetupText") end -- Delete setup text?
    end

    -- Table-related setup tasks *after* setup code routine
    if vType == "Post-Setup" then
        tc.playerTurn() -- Set turn order & active player then trigger turn
        if tGameOption_TC.autodraw then tc.drawInitialCards() end -- Draw initial auto-draw cards?
        Global.UI.setAttribute("setup", "active", false) -- Hide xml setup button
        tGameData_TC.setup = true -- Setup done
    end

    -- Table-related round tasks *before* round code routine
    if vType == "Pre-Round" then

        -- No code

    end

    -- Table-related round tasks *after* round code routine
    if vType == "Post-Round" then
        tc.playerTurn() -- Set turn order & active player then trigger turn
    end
end

function tc.del(vType) -- Delete objects et al. based on provided type
    -- Delete setup-related text
    if vType == "SetupText" then
        local tText = {"e710f6", "0f6bf1", "20e1cc", "1ce285", "e03f08", "dd9a9c", "13599c"}
        for _, gText in ipairs(tText) do
            if Util.get(gText) then Util.del(gText) end
        end
    end

    -- Delete banners
    if vType == "Banners" then
        for _, oHandZone in ipairs(Hands.getHands()) do
            for _, obj in ipairs(oHandZone.getObjects(true)) do
                if obj.hasTag("Banner_TC") then Util.del(obj) end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Delete hotseat buttons
    if vType == "HotseatButtons" then
        for _, oHandZone in ipairs(Hands.getHands()) do
            for _, obj in ipairs(oHandZone.getObjects(true)) do
                if obj.hasTag("HotseatButton_TC") then Util.del(obj) end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Delete everything on table (except tagged with "_TC" suffix)
    if vType == "Table" then
        for _, obj in ipairs(getObjects()) do
            if obj.type ~= "Hand" then
                local bDelete = true
                for _, vTag in ipairs(obj.getTags()) do
                    if string.match(vTag, "_TC$") then
                        bDelete = false
                        break
                    end
                end
                if bDelete then Util.del(obj) end
            end
        end
        -- Delete all vector lines
        Global.setVectorLines({})
    end

    -- Delete hand zones & objects
    if vType == "Hands" then
        for _, oHandZone in ipairs(Hands.getHands()) do
            for _, obj in ipairs(oHandZone.getObjects(true)) do
                if obj.hasTag("HandZone_TC") then Util.del(obj) end
            end
            Util.del(oHandZone)
        end
    end
end

-- PLAYER

function tc.onChangeColor(vPlayerColor) -- Table-related tasks when onPlayerChangeColor() event triggered
    if vPlayerColor ~= "Grey" and vPlayerColor ~= "Black" then
        local oPlayer = Player[vPlayerColor]
        local nSteamID = oPlayer.steam_id
        -- Create player using steam id
        if not Util.is(tGamePlayer_TC[nSteamID]) then
            tGamePlayer_TC[nSteamID] = {
                name = "",
                color = "",
                hotseat = {}
            }
            Util.broadcast("Welcome "..oPlayer.steam_name.."!", "All", vPlayerColor)
        end
        -- Update player's steam name
        tGamePlayer_TC[nSteamID].name = oPlayer.steam_name
        -- Banners enabled?
        if tGameOption_TC.banners then
            -- Add/remove xml name & update player's color
            tc.xmlName(nSteamID, vPlayerColor)
        else
            -- Update player's color
            tGamePlayer_TC[nSteamID].color = vPlayerColor
        end
        -- Remove xml name from players        
        tc.removeXmlNames()
    end
end

function tc.onPlayerTurn(oPlayer, oPrevPlayer) -- Table-related tasks when onPlayerTurn() event triggered
    -- Move turn marker
    if Util.is(oPlayer) then
        tGameData_TC.turn = oPlayer.color
        tc.moveTurn(oPlayer.color)
    end
    -- Auto-draw cards enabled?
    if tGameOption_TC.autodraw then
        -- Auto-draw cards end of turn (if indicated)
        for nPile = 1, nCardPiles_TC do
            -- Draw end turn boolean exists?
            if Util.is(_G["bDrawEndTurn"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
                -- Draw end turn only?
                if _G["bDrawEndTurn"..nPile.."_TC"] then
                    -- Card positions exist?
                    if Util.is(_G["tCardPos"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
                        local tCardPos = _G["tCardPos"..nPile.."_TC"]
                        -- Card zone exists?
                        if Util.get(_G["gCardZone"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
                            local oCardZone = Util.get(_G["gCardZone"..nPile.."_TC"])
                            -- Trigger auto-draw card functions
                            _G["bDrawEndTurn"..nPile.."_TC"] = false
                            Wait.condition(
                                -- Set draw end of turn boolean true once card zone is filled
                                function() _G["bDrawEndTurn"..nPile.."_TC"] = true end,
                                function()
                                    local nCount = 0
                                    -- Count deck/card objects in card zone
                                    for _, obj in ipairs(oCardZone.getObjects()) do
                                        if obj.type == "Deck" or obj.type == "Card" then nCount = nCount + 1 end
                                    end
                                    -- Return true if # of cards in card zone equals # of card positions
                                    if nCount >= #tCardPos then return true end
                                    -- Otherwise, return false
                                    return false
                                end
                            )
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.xmlName(nSteamID1, vNewPlayerColor)-- Add/remove xml name & update player's color
    local oPlayer = Player[vNewPlayerColor]
    local vOldPlayerColor = tGamePlayer_TC[nSteamID1].color
    local nSteamID2 = nil
    local bHotseat = false
    -- Hotseat enabled?
    if tGameOption_TC.hotseat then
        -- Is new player's color a hotseat?
        for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
            if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                for vColor, vName in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                    if vColor == vNewPlayerColor then
                        nSteamID2 = nSteamID
                        bHotseat = true
                        break
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        -- Is new player's color a player with their hotseat seated?
        for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
            if tPlayer.color == vNewPlayerColor then
                if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                    for vColor1, vName in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                        for _, vColor2 in ipairs(Util.seated()) do
                            if vColor1 == vColor2 then
                                bHotseat = true
                                break
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    -- If hotseat detected, don't remove xml from banner
    if bHotseat then
        -- If a player attempts to change color to another player's hotseat, change back to previous color
        if nSteamID1 ~= nSteamID2 then
            oPlayer.changeColor(vOldPlayerColor)
        else
            -- If setup not done, no players can change color to their hotseats
            if not tGameData_TC.setup then oPlayer.changeColor(vOldPlayerColor) end
        end
    else
        local bDetect = false
        -- Don't remove xml name if duplicate color assignments
        for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
            if nSteamID ~= nSteamID1 then
                if tPlayer.color == vOldPlayerColor then
                    bDetect = true
                    break
                end
            end
        end
        if not bDetect then
            -- Remove xml name from old banner color
            if Util.is(vOldPlayerColor) then
                local oOldBanner = tc.getBanner(vOldPlayerColor)
                if oOldBanner then oOldBanner.UI.setAttribute("name", "text", "") end
            end
        end
        -- Add xml name to new banner color
        local oNewBanner = tc.getBanner(vNewPlayerColor)
        if oNewBanner then oNewBanner.UI.setAttribute("name", "text", oPlayer.steam_name) end
        -- Set player to new player color    
        tGamePlayer_TC[nSteamID1].color = vNewPlayerColor
    end
end

function tc.migratePlayerColor(nSteamID1, vNewPlayerColor) -- Migrate player color & hotseats to new player
    for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        -- Old player color?
        if vNewPlayerColor == tPlayer.color then
            -- If existing, migrate hotseats to new player
            if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                tGamePlayer_TC[nSteamID1].hotseat = tPlayer.hotseat
                tPlayer.hotseat = ""
            end
            -- Remove color from previous player
            tPlayer.color = ""
            break
        end
    end
    -- Set player to new player color    
    tGamePlayer_TC[nSteamID1].color = vNewPlayerColor
end

function tc.removeXmlNames() -- Remove xml name from players
    -- Check to remove xml names from valid seat colors
    for _, vColor1 in ipairs(Player.getAvailableColors()) do
        local bSeated = false
        -- Is a player seated in this valid seat color?        
        for _, vColor2 in ipairs(Util.seated()) do
            if vColor1 == vColor2 then
                -- Player seated in this valid seat color; do not remove
                bSeated = true
                break
            end
        end
        -- Player not seated in this valid seat color
        if not bSeated then
            local bHotseat = false
            -- Hotseat mode?
            if tGameOption_TC.hotseat then
                -- Is hotseat seated in this valid seat color?
                for _, vColor3 in ipairs(tc.hotseatColor()) do
                    if vColor1 == vColor3 then
                        -- Hotseat seated in this valid seat color; do not remove
                        bHotseat = true
                        break
                    end
                end
            end
            -- Hotseat not seated at this valid seat color
            if not bHotseat then
                local bPlayer = false
                -- Hotseat mode?
                if tGameOption_TC.hotseat then
                    -- Is this player color seated in one of their hotseats? If so, do not remove
                    bPlayer = tc.isHotseatSeated(vColor1)
                end
                -- Player color not seated in one of their hotseats
                if not bPlayer then
                    -- Remove xml name for this valid seat color
                    local oBanner = tc.getBanner(vColor1)
                    if oBanner then oBanner.UI.setAttribute("name", "text", "") end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.isHotseatSeated(vColor) -- Return true if this player color is seated in one of their hotseats
    for _, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        if tPlayer.color == vColor then
            if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                for vColor1, vName in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                    for _, vColor2 in ipairs(Util.seated()) do
                        if vColor1 == vColor2 then return true end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.hotseatColor() -- Returns an indexed table of hotseat colors
    local tHotseat = {}
    for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
            for vColor, vName in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                tHotseat[#tHotseat+1] = vColor
            end
        end
    end
    return tHotseat
end

function tc.getBanner(vPlayerColor) -- Return banner object for player's color
    for gZone, vColor in pairs(tc.handGUID_Color()) do
        if vPlayerColor == vColor then
            local oHandZone = Util.get(gZone)
            for _, obj in ipairs(oHandZone.getObjects(true)) do
                if obj.hasTag("Banner_TC") then return obj end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.setXmlPlayerNames() -- Add xml player names to banners if player banners enabled
    if tGameOption_TC.banners then
        for _, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
            -- Add xml player name to banner
            if Util.is(tPlayer.color) and tPlayer.color ~= "Black" then
                local oBanner1 = tc.getBanner(tPlayer.color)
                if oBanner1 then oBanner1.UI.setAttribute("name", "text", tPlayer.name) end
            end
            if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                -- Add xml hotseat name to banner                
                for vColor, vName in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                    local oBanner2 = tc.getBanner(vColor)
                    if oBanner2 then oBanner2.UI.setAttribute("name", "text", vName) end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.getPlayerName(vPlayerColor)
    -- Players
    for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        if vPlayerColor == tPlayer.color then return tPlayer.name end
    end
    -- Hotseats
    for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
            for vColor, vName in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                if vPlayerColor == vColor then return vName end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.getPlayer(vColor) -- Return a player instance for provided player/hotseat color
    for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        for _, oPlayer in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
            if nSteamID == oPlayer.steam_id then
                if tPlayer.color == vColor then
                    return oPlayer
                else
                    if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                        for vHotseatColor, _ in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                            if vHotseatColor == vColor then return oPlayer end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

-- TURN

function tc.playerOrder() -- Return table of seated/hotseat player colors sorted by turn order
    local tPlayers = {}
    local tTurnOrder = {}
    local tTurnOrder1_TC = {}
    -- Add seated player colors (excluding spectators & black)
    for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        for _, oPlayer in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
            if oPlayer.color ~= "Grey" and oPlayer.color ~= "Black" then
                if nSteamID == oPlayer.steam_id then
                    tPlayers[#tPlayers+1] = tPlayer.color
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
    -- Hotseat mode?
    if tGameOption_TC.hotseat then
        -- Add hotseats to player colors (if player assigned to hotseats is seated)
        for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
            if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                for _, vColor1 in ipairs(tPlayers) do
                    if tPlayer.color == vColor1 then
                        for vColor2, vName in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do tPlayers[#tPlayers+1] = vColor2 end
                        break
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        -- 
    end
    -- Script-provided turn order detected?
    if Util.is(tTurnOrder_TC) then
        -- Create copy of script-provided turn order
        tTurnOrder1_TC = Util.copyTable(tTurnOrder_TC)
        -- Check if script-provided turn order colors are seated/hotseat players
        for _, vColor1 in ipairs(tTurnOrder_TC) do
            local bDetect = false
            for _, vColor2 in ipairs(tPlayers) do
                if vColor1 == vColor2 then
                    bDetect = true
                    break
                end
            end
            -- If seated/hotseat player, have they passed?
            if bDetect then
                for _, vColor2 in ipairs(tPassColors_TC) do
                    if vColor1 == vColor2 then
                        bDetect = false
                        break
                    end
                end
            end
            -- If not detected as seated/hotseat player or has passed, remove from turn order
            if not bDetect then tTurnOrder1_TC = Util.filterTable(tTurnOrder1_TC, function(x) return x ~= vColor1 end) end
        end
        -- Create turn order from filtered, script-provided turn order
        tTurnOrder = Util.copyTable(tTurnOrder1_TC)
    end
    -- Remove passed player colors
    for _, vColor1 in ipairs(tPlayers) do
        for _, vColor2 in ipairs(tPassColors_TC) do
            if vColor1 == vColor2 then
                tPlayers = Util.filterTable(tPlayers, function(x) return x ~= vColor1 end)
                break
            end
        end
    end
    -- Sort player colors by turn order
    for _, vColor1 in ipairs(Turns.getTurnOrder()) do
        for _, vColor2 in ipairs(tPlayers) do
            if vColor1 == vColor2 then
                local bDetect = false
                -- If already in turn order, skip
                for _, vColor3 in ipairs(tTurnOrder1_TC) do
                    if vColor1 == vColor3 then
                        bDetect = true
                        break
                    end
                end
                if not bDetect then tTurnOrder[#tTurnOrder+1] = vColor1 end
                break
            end
        end
    end
    -- Set turn order xml button bar player names & colors
    tc.setXmlBtnColors(tTurnOrder)
    -- Reverse turn order direction?    
    if not tGameOption_TC.clockwise then tTurnOrder = Util.invertTable(tTurnOrder, true) end
    return tTurnOrder
end

function tc.playerTurn(bTurn) -- Set turn order & active player then trigger turn
    local tTurnOrder = tc.playerOrder()
    local vTurnColor = ""
    -- XML player button clicked after load from save?
    if bTurn then
        -- Saved turn color from previous session?
        if Util.is(tGameData_TC.turn) then
            vTurnColor = tGameData_TC.turn
        else
            -- Turn color not detected, set to 1st color in turn order
            vTurnColor = tTurnOrder[1]
        end
    else
        -- Save & set start player to 1st color in turn order
        vTurnColor = tTurnOrder[1]
        tGameData_TC.start = vTurnColor -- Start player
    end
    -- Multiplayer?
    if #tTurnOrder > 1 then
        -- If hotseat mode, disable TTS turns system
        if tGameOption_TC.hotseat then
            Turns.enable = false
        else
            -- Enable TTS turns system
            Turns.enable = true
            Turns.type = 2
            Turns.order = tTurnOrder
        end
        -- If player a hotseat, apply blindfold, change color & update turn color
        if Util.is(tc.isHotseat(vTurnColor)) then
            tc.isHotseat(vTurnColor, true)
        else
            -- If not a hotseat, update turn color
            tGameData_TC.turn = vTurnColor
        end
        -- Set turn order xml button bar's active player
        tc.setXmlBtnActive(vTurnColor)
        -- Move start/turn markers
        tc.moveStart(vTurnColor)
        tc.moveTurn(vTurnColor)
        -- If new game, prompt for random start player
        if not tGameData_TC.setup then
            -- Get host player
            if Util.is(Util.getHostColor()) then
                local oHostPlayer = Player[Util.getHostColor()]
                -- Prompt host for random player
                oHostPlayer.showConfirmDialog("Random start player?\n",
                    function(_)
                        -- Randomly assign start player
                        local vStartPlayerName = nil
                        local vNewTurnColor = tTurnOrder[math.random(#tTurnOrder)]
                        -- If random start player a hotseat, apply blindfold, change color & update turn color
                        if Util.is(tc.isHotseat(vNewTurnColor)) then
                            vStartPlayerName = tc.isHotseat(vNewTurnColor, true)
                        else
                            -- Update turn color
                            for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
                                if tPlayer.color == vNewTurnColor then vStartPlayerName = tPlayer.name end
                            end
                            Player[vTurnColor].changeColor(vNewTurnColor)
                            tGameData_TC.turn = vNewTurnColor
                        end
                        Util.broadcast(vStartPlayerName.." is the random start player!", "All", vNewTurnColor)
                        -- If not hotseat mode then set TTS turn color
                        if not tGameOption_TC.hotseat then Turns.turn_color = vNewTurnColor end
                        -- Save start player color
                        tGameData_TC.start = vNewTurnColor
                        -- Set turn order xml button bar's active player
                        tc.setXmlBtnActive(vNewTurnColor)
                        -- Move start/turn markers
                        tc.moveStart(vNewTurnColor)
                        tc.moveTurn(vNewTurnColor)
                    end
                )
            end
        end
    else
        -- Single player
        Turns.enable = false
        tc.moveStart(vTurnColor)
        tc.moveTurn(vTurnColor)
    end
end

function tc.moveStart(vPlayerColor) -- Move start marker
    local tPos, tRot = tc.getMarker(vPlayerColor, true)
    if tGameOption_TC.smarker then
        if Util.get(gStartMarker_TC) then
            Util.move({
                Obj = gStartMarker_TC,
                Pos = tPos,
                Rot = tRot,
            })
        end
    end
end

function tc.moveTurn(vPlayerColor) -- Move turn marker
    local tPos, tRot = tc.getMarker(vPlayerColor, false)
    if tGameOption_TC.tmarker then
        if Util.get(gTurnMarker_TC) then
            Util.move({
                Obj = gTurnMarker_TC,
                Pos = tPos,
                Rot = tRot,
            })
        end
    end
end

function tc.getMarker(vPlayerColor, bStart) -- Return position & rotation to move start/turn marker based on hand zone
    local nHeight = 6 -- Start/turn marker height    
    local nOffset = 0 -- X-axis offset from hand zone position
    local zOffset = 0.35 -- Z-axis offset from hand zone position
    if bStart then nOffset = 14 else nOffset = -14 end -- Start/turn marker offset
    for gZone, vColor in pairs(tc.handGUID_Color()) do
        if vPlayerColor == vColor then
            local oHandZone = Util.get(gZone)
            local xOffset = nOffset * (oHandZone.getScale().x / 24) -- X-axis offset adjusted for scale
            local tPos = oHandZone.getPosition()
            local tRot = oHandZone.getRotation()
            if (tRot.y < 45) or (tRot.y > 320) or (tRot.y > 135 and tRot.y < 225) then
                if tPos.z > 0 then -- Top or bottom
                    tPos.x = tPos.x + xOffset -- Top (x-axis)
                    tPos.z = tPos.z - zOffset -- Top (z-axis)
                else
                    tPos.x = tPos.x - xOffset -- Bottom (x-axis)
                    tPos.z = tPos.z + zOffset -- Bottom (z-axis)                            
                end
            else
                if tPos.x < 0 then -- Left or right
                    tPos.x = tPos.x + zOffset -- Left (x-axis)                        
                    tPos.z = tPos.z + xOffset -- Left (z-axis)
                else
                    tPos.x = tPos.x - zOffset -- Right (x-axis)
                    tPos.z = tPos.z - xOffset -- Right (z-axis)
                end
            end
            tPos.y = nHeight
            return tPos, tRot
        end
    end
end

-- AUTO-DRAW CARDS

function tc.autoDrawCards() -- Trigger auto-draw cards timed functions (if setup done)
    tc.timedFunc("checkCardsTaken", true) -- Check if cards taken (draw new cards)
    tc.timedFunc("checkEmptyPiles", true) -- Check if draw pile(s) empty (refill)
end

function tc.drawInitialCards() -- Shuffle & draw initial cards
    local function drawCards()
        for nPile = 1, nCardPiles_TC do
            -- Card positions exist?
            if Util.is(_G["tCardPos"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
                -- Draw a card to each card position                
                local tCardPos = _G["tCardPos"..nPile.."_TC"]
                for i, tPos in ipairs(tCardPos) do tc.drawCard(tPos, nPile) end
            end
        end
    end
    -- Shuffle each draw pile deck
    for nPile = 1, nCardPiles_TC do
        -- Draw pile zone exists?
        if Util.get(_G["gDrawZone"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
            local oDrawZone = Util.get(_G["gDrawZone"..nPile.."_TC"])
            -- Shuffle deck in draw zone
            for _, obj in ipairs(oDrawZone.getObjects()) do
                if obj.type == "Deck" then obj.shuffle() end
            end
        end
    end
    -- Draw initial cards
    Wait.time(function() drawCards() end, 0.5)
end

function tc.checkCardsTaken() -- Check if cards taken (draw replacement cards)
    -- Auto-draw cards enabled?
    if tGameOption_TC.autodraw then
        for nPile = 1, nCardPiles_TC do
            local bDrawEndTurn = _G["bDrawEndTurn"..nPile.."_TC"]
            local bContinue = false
            -- Draw cards end of turn only?
            if not bDrawEndTurn then
                -- Draw pile zone exists?
                if Util.get(_G["gDrawZone"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
                    local oDrawZone = Util.get(_G["gDrawZone"..nPile.."_TC"])
                    -- Deck/card in draw zone & resting?
                    for _, obj in ipairs(oDrawZone.getObjects()) do
                        if obj.type == "Deck" or obj.type == "Card" then
                            if obj.resting then bContinue = true end
                        end
                    end
                    -- Draw pile ready, draw replacement cards
                    if bContinue then tc.replaceCardTaken(nPile) end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.replaceCardTaken(nPile) -- Draw replacement card
    local tCardList = {}
    local tCardExist = {}
    -- Card positions exist?
    if Util.is(_G["tCardPos"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
        local tCardPos = _G["tCardPos"..nPile.."_TC"]
        -- Initialize card exist table (0 = no, 1 = yes)
        for i = 1, #tCardPos do tCardExist[i] = 0 end
        -- Card zone exists?
        if Util.get(_G["gCardZone"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
            local oCardZone = Util.get(_G["gCardZone"..nPile.."_TC"])
            -- Create table of deck/card objects
            for _, obj in ipairs(oCardZone.getObjects()) do
                if obj.type == "Deck" or obj.type == "Card" then table.insert(tCardList, obj) end
            end
            -- # of deck/card objects in card zone less than # of card positions?
            if #tCardList < #tCardPos then
                -- Deck/card objects exist in each card position?
                for _, obj in ipairs(tCardList) do
                    local tPos1 = obj.getPosition()
                    for i, tPos2 in ipairs(tCardPos) do
                        -- Update card exist table if deck/card object found in that position
                        if Util.isVectorEqual(tPos1, tPos2) then tCardExist[i] = 1 end
                    end
                end
                -- Draw card for a card position without a card
                for nPos, nExist in ipairs(tCardExist) do
                    if nExist == 0 then
                        tc.drawCard(tCardPos[nPos], nPile)
                        break
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.checkEmptyPiles() -- Check if draw pile(s) empty (refill)
    -- Auto-draw cards enabled?
    if tGameOption_TC.autodraw then
        for nPile = 1, nCardPiles_TC do
            local tCardList = {}
            -- Draw pile zone exists?
            if Util.get(_G["gDrawZone"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
                local oDrawZone = Util.get(_G["gDrawZone"..nPile.."_TC"])
                -- Create table of deck/card objects
                for _, obj in ipairs(oDrawZone.getObjects()) do
                    if obj.type == "Deck" or obj.type == "Card" then table.insert(tCardList, obj) end
                end
                -- If no deck/cards in draw pile, refill empty pile
                if #tCardList == 0 then tc.refillEmptyPile(nPile) end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.refillEmptyPile(nPile) -- Refill empty draw pile(s) from discard pile
    local function doShuffle(tDiscard)
        for _, obj in ipairs(tDiscard) do
            if obj.type == "Deck" then obj.shuffle() end
        end
    end
    local tDiscard = {}
    -- Discard zone exists?
    if Util.is(_G["gDiscardZone"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
        local oDiscardZone = Util.get(_G["gDiscardZone"..nPile.."_TC"])
        -- Deck/card in discard zone & resting?
        for _, obj in ipairs(oDiscardZone.getObjects()) do
            if obj.type == "Deck" or obj.type == "Card" then
                -- Create table of deck/card object in discard pile
                if obj.resting then table.insert(tDiscard, obj) end
            end
        end
    end
    -- Draw pile position exists?
    if Util.is(_G["tDrawPos"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
        local tDrawPos = _G["tDrawPos"..nPile.."_TC"]
        -- Move deck/card to draw pile position
        for _, obj in ipairs(tDiscard) do
            local tRot = obj.getRotation()
            obj.setPosition(tDrawPos)
            obj.setRotation({0, tRot.y, 180})
        end
    end
    -- Shuffle deck/card in draw pile
    if #tDiscard > 0 then Wait.time(function() doShuffle(tDiscard) end, 0.5) end
end

function tc.drawCard(tPos, nPile) -- Draw a card from draw pile
    -- Draw pile zone exists?
    if Util.get(_G["gDrawZone"..nPile.."_TC"]) then
        local oDrawZone = Util.get(_G["gDrawZone"..nPile.."_TC"])
        -- Draw card to position
        for _, obj in ipairs(oDrawZone.getObjects()) do
            if obj.type == 'Deck' then
                local tParams = {position = tPos, flip = true}
                obj.takeObject(tParams)
            elseif obj.type == 'Card' then
                local tRot = obj.getRotation()
                obj.setPositionSmooth(tPos)
                obj.setRotationSmooth({0, tRot.y, 0})
            end
        end
    end
end

-- HAND ZONES

function tc.heightHand() -- Set hand zone height (ie. hides default player names under banners)
    local nHeight = 1.05
    for _, oHandZone in ipairs(Hands.getHands()) do
        for _, obj in ipairs(oHandZone.getObjects(true)) do
            if obj.hasTag("HandZone_TC") then
                local tPos = oHandZone.getPosition()
                oHandZone.setPosition({tPos.x, nHeight, tPos.z})
                break
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.checkHandZone() -- Check & color tagged hand zone objects as zone color
    for gHandZone, vColor in pairs(tc.handGUID_Color()) do
        if Util.get(gHandZone) then
            for _, obj in ipairs(Util.get(gHandZone).getObjects(true)) do
                if obj.hasTag("HandZone_TC") then
                    if not Util.isColorEqual(vColor, obj.getColorTint()) then
                        obj.setColorTint(Util.toColorVector(vColor))
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.handGUID_Color() -- Create table of hand zone GUIDs & color strings
    local tHands = {}
    for _, oZone in ipairs(Hands.getHands()) do
        tHands[oZone.getGUID()] = Util.toColorString(oZone.getColorTint())
    end
    return tHands
end

function tc.setInteractable(vTag, bMode) -- Set interactable in hand zones based on mode
    for _, oHandZone in ipairs(Hands.getHands()) do
        for _, obj in ipairs(oHandZone.getObjects(true)) do
            if obj.hasTag(vTag) then
                obj.interactable = bMode
                obj.gizmo_selectable = bMode
            end
        end
    end
end

-- HOT SEAT

function click_Hotseat_TC(oButton, vPlayerColor, bAltClick) -- Hotseat button clicked
    local function changeColor(vName, oPlayer, vNewTurnColor, tTurnOrder)
        -- Player instance exists for old turn color?
        if oPlayer then
            -- Change player color, move turn marker & update turn color
            oPlayer.changeColor(vNewTurnColor)
            tc.moveTurn(vNewTurnColor)
            tGameData_TC.turn = vNewTurnColor
            -- Set turn order xml button bar's active player
            tc.setXmlBtnActive(vNewTurnColor)
            Util.broadcast(vName.."'s turn!","All", vNewTurnColor)
        end
    end
    local oHotseatPlayer = Player[vPlayerColor]
    local oHotseatSteamID = oHotseatPlayer.steam_id
    local vButtonColor = Util.toColorString(oButton.getColorTint())
    if not bAltClick then
        -- Hotseat mode?
        if tGameOption_TC.hotseat then
             -- If setup done, buttons used to end turns
            if tGameData_TC.setup then
                -- END TURN (on player's turn)
                -- Only button color of current turn color can end turn
                if vButtonColor == tGameData_TC.turn then
                    -- Only player of button's color or host/promoted can end turn
                    if vPlayerColor == vButtonColor or Util.perm(vPlayerColor) then
                        local tTurnOrder = tc.playerOrder()
                        local oPlayer = nil
                        local vNextPlayerName = nil
                        local vOldTurnColor = nil
                        local vNewTurnColor = nil
                        -- Get previous & next turn color
                        for nIndex, vColor in ipairs(tTurnOrder) do
                            -- Turn color matches button color
                            if vButtonColor == vColor then
                                vOldTurnColor = tTurnOrder[nIndex]
                                -- End of turn order? Loop back to start                                
                                if nIndex == #tTurnOrder then nIndex = 0 end
                                vNewTurnColor = tTurnOrder[nIndex+1]
                                break
                            end
                        end
                        -- Get player instance from old turn color
                        oPlayer = tc.getPlayer(vOldTurnColor)
                        -- Is next turn color a hotseat?
                        if Util.is(tc.isHotseat(vNewTurnColor)) then
                            -- Apply blindfold, change color, update turn color & move turn marker
                            tc.isHotseat(vNewTurnColor, true)
                            -- Set turn order xml button bar's active player
                            tc.setXmlBtnActive(vNewTurnColor)
                            tc.moveTurn(vNewTurnColor)
                        else
                            -- Is previous turn color a hotseat of the next player?                            
                            vNextPlayerName = tc.prevHotseat(vOldTurnColor, vNewTurnColor)
                            if Util.is(vNextPlayerName) then
                                -- Apply blindfold to player's hotseat
                                oPlayer.blindfolded = not oPlayer.blindfolded
                                -- Change player color, move turn marker & update turn color
                                Wait.time(function() changeColor(vNextPlayerName, oPlayer, vNewTurnColor, tTurnOrder) end, 0.5)
                            else
                                local oPlayerHotseat = nil
                                -- Is the next player seated in one of their hotseats?                                
                                vNextPlayerName, oPlayerHotseat = tc.nextSeated(vNewTurnColor)
                                if Util.is(vNextPlayerName) then
                                    -- Change player color, move turn marker & update turn color
                                    changeColor(vNextPlayerName, oPlayerHotseat, vNewTurnColor, tTurnOrder)
                                else
                                    for _, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
                                        if tPlayer.color == vNewTurnColor then vNextPlayerName = tPlayer.name end
                                    end
                                    -- Change player color, move turn marker & update turn color
                                    changeColor(vNextPlayerName, oPlayer, vNewTurnColor, tTurnOrder)
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                else
                    -- PASS TURN (not player's turn)
                    -- Only player of button's color or host/promoted can set pass
                    if vPlayerColor == vButtonColor or Util.perm(vPlayerColor) then
                        local vName = ""
                        local oBanner = nil
                        local bDetect = false
                        -- Get player's name
                        if Util.is(tc.getPlayerName(vButtonColor)) then vName = tc.getPlayerName(vButtonColor) end
                        -- Get player's banner object
                        if Util.is(tc.getBanner(vButtonColor)) then oBanner = tc.getBanner(vButtonColor) end
                        -- Toggle pass status
                        for _, vColor in ipairs(tPassColors_TC) do
                            if vColor == vButtonColor then
                                bDetect = true
                                break
                            end
                        end
                        -- Detected in pass table
                        if bDetect then
                            -- Remove from pass table                            
                            tPassColors_TC = Util.filterTable(tPassColors_TC, function(x) return x ~= vButtonColor end)
                            -- Disable banner pass stamp
                            if Util.is(oBanner) then oBanner.UI.setAttribute("pass", "active", false) end
                            if Util.is(vName) then Util.broadcast(vName.." *not* set to pass!", "All", vButtonColor) end
                        else
                            -- Add to pass table
                            tPassColors_TC[#tPassColors_TC+1] = vButtonColor
                            -- Enable banner pass stamp
                            if Util.is(oBanner) then oBanner.UI.setAttribute("pass", "active", true) end
                            if Util.is(vName) then Util.broadcast(vName.." set to pass!", "All", vButtonColor) end
                        end
                    end
                end
            else
                -- If setup not done, button adds/removes hotseat
                if vPlayerColor ~= vButtonColor and Player[vButtonColor].seated == false and vPlayerColor ~= "Black" then
                    -- Is button's color the player's hotseat?
                    if tc.isPlayerHotseat(vButtonColor, vPlayerColor) then
                        -- Remove xml name from banner
                        local oRemBanner = tc.getBanner(vButtonColor)
                        if oRemBanner then
                            local fFunc = function(x) return x ~= vButtonColor end
                            local vHotseatName = oRemBanner.UI.getAttribute("name", "text")
                            oRemBanner.UI.setAttribute("name", "text", "")
                            -- Remove hotseat from player color
                            tGamePlayer_TC[oHotseatSteamID].hotseat = Util.filterTable(tGamePlayer_TC[oHotseatSteamID].hotseat, fFunc)
                            Util.broadcast("Hotseat ("..vHotseatName..") removed for "..oHotseatPlayer.steam_name, "All", vButtonColor)
                        end
                    else
                        -- Already a hotseat?
                        if not Util.is(tc.isHotseat(vButtonColor)) then
                            -- Prompt to enter hotseat name
                            oHotseatPlayer.showInputDialog("Enter Hotseat Name:\n","Hotseat",
                                function(vHotseatName)
                                    -- Add xml name to banner
                                    local oAddBanner = tc.getBanner(vButtonColor)
                                    if oAddBanner then
                                        oAddBanner.UI.setAttribute("name", "text", vHotseatName)
                                        -- Add hotseat to player color
                                        tGamePlayer_TC[oHotseatSteamID].hotseat[vButtonColor] = vHotseatName
                                        Util.broadcast("Hotseat ("..vHotseatName..") added for "..oHotseatPlayer.steam_name, "All", vButtonColor)
                                    end
                                end
                            )
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    oButton.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(0)
end

function tc.isPlayerHotseat(vColor1, vPlayerColor) -- Return true if hotseat color is a player's hotseat
    for _, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
            for vColor2, _ in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                -- Hotseat color detected for provided player?
                if vColor1 == vColor2 then
                    -- Hotseat color is player's hotseat
                    if tPlayer.color == vPlayerColor then return true end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.isHotseat(vNewTurnColor, bChange) -- Returns hotseat name & changes color (if indicated)
    local function changeColor(oPlayer, vHotseatName)
        oPlayer.changeColor(vNewTurnColor)
        Util.broadcast(vHotseatName.."'s turn!","All", vNewTurnColor)
    end
    local vHotseatName = nil
    local bHotseat = false
    -- Is new turn color a hotseat?
    for _, vColor in ipairs(tc.hotseatColor()) do
        if vNewTurnColor == vColor then
            bHotseat = true
            break
        end
    end
    -- Hotseat detected?
    if bHotseat then
        -- Get steam id & hotseat name from player
        for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
            if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                for vColor1, vName1 in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                    if vNewTurnColor == vColor1 then
                        vHotseatName = vName1
                        -- If change indicated, apply blindfold, change color & update turn color
                        if bChange then
                            local vPlayerColor = nil
                            -- Get color of hotseat's player
                            for _, oPlayer in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
                                if oPlayer.steam_id == nSteamID then
                                    vPlayerColor = oPlayer.color
                                    break
                                end
                            end
                            if Util.is(vPlayerColor) then
                                local oPlayer = Player[vPlayerColor]
                                -- Apply blindfold to hotseat's player
                                oPlayer.blindfolded = not oPlayer.blindfolded
                                -- Update turn color
                                tGameData_TC.turn = vNewTurnColor
                                -- Change color to player's hotseat
                                Wait.time(function() changeColor(oPlayer, vHotseatName) end, 0.5)
                            end
                        end
                        return vHotseatName
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    else
        return vHotseatName
    end
end

function tc.prevHotseat(vOldTurnColor, vNewTurnColor) -- Is previous turn color a hotseat of the next player?
    for _, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        -- Get next player from next turn color
        if tPlayer.color == vNewTurnColor then
            -- Get next player's name
            vPlayerName = tPlayer.name
            if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                -- Is previous color that player's hotseat?
                for vColor, _ in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                    if vColor == vOldTurnColor then
                        -- Previous color is player's hotseat
                        return vPlayerName
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function tc.nextSeated(vNewTurnColor) -- Is the next player seated in one of their hotseats?
    for _, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        -- Get next player from next turn color
        if tPlayer.color == vNewTurnColor then
            vPlayerName = tPlayer.name
            -- Does next player color have hotseats?
            if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
                -- If hotseats, is player seated in one of them?
                for vHotseatColor, _ in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                    if Player[vHotseatColor].seated then return vPlayerName, Player[vHotseatColor] end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

-- XML

function tc.setXmlBtnColors(tTurnOrder) -- Set turn order xml button bar player names & colors
    -- Hotseat mode?
    if tGameOption_TC.hotseat then
        -- Turn order xml button bar colors
        tXmlBtnColors_TC = {}
        -- Reset xml buttons
        for i = 1, 10 do Global.UI.setAttributes("btn"..i, {
            active = "false",
            outline = "#000000"
        })
        end
        -- Set xml button attributes
        for i, vColor in ipairs(tTurnOrder) do
            -- Set player color & name
            for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
                if vColor == tPlayer.color then
                    Global.UI.setAttributes("btn"..i, {
                        active = "true",
                        text = tPlayer.name,
                        color = Util.toColorHex(vColor, true, 0.5),
                        tooltip = "Set Turn"
                    })
                end
            end
            -- Set hotseat color & name
            if Util.is(tc.getHotseatName(vColor)) then
                Global.UI.setAttributes("btn"..i, {
                    active = "true",
                    text = tc.getHotseatName(vColor),
                    color = Util.toColorHex(vColor, true, 0.5),
                    tooltip = "Set Turn"
                })
            end
            -- Reset text color due to TTS bug
            Global.UI.setAttribute("btn"..i, "textColor", "#ffffff")
            -- Update turn order xml button bar colors
            tXmlBtnColors_TC[i] = vColor
        end
        -- Set turn order direction indicators
        Global.UI.setAttributes("cw", {
            active = tGameOption_TC.clockwise,
            color = "White"
        })
        Global.UI.setAttributes("ccw", {
            active = not tGameOption_TC.clockwise,
            color = "White"
        })
    end
end

function tc.setXmlBtnActive(vActiveColor) -- Set turn order xml button bar's active player
    -- Only for hotseat mode
    if tGameOption_TC.hotseat then
        -- Reset xml button outlines
        for i = 1, 10 do Global.UI.setAttribute("btn"..i, "outline", "#000000") end
        -- Set active xml button attributes
        for i = 1, 10 do
            -- Update active xml button color based on id #
            if vActiveColor == tXmlBtnColors_TC[i] then
                Global.UI.setAttributes("btn"..i, {
                    color = Util.toColorHex(vActiveColor),
                    outline = "#ffffff",
                    tooltip = "End Turn"
                })
            end
            -- Reset text color due to TTS bug
            Global.UI.setAttribute("btn"..i, "textColor", "#ffffff")
        end
    end
end

function tc.getHotseatName(vColor) -- Get name from hotseat color
    for nSteamID, tPlayer in pairs(tGamePlayer_TC) do
        if Util.is(tPlayer.hotseat) then
            for vHotseatColor, vHotseatName in pairs(tPlayer.hotseat) do
                if vColor == vHotseatColor then return vHotseatName end
            end
        end
    end
end

-- TABLE

function tc.scaleTable(nScaleWidth, nScaleDepth) -- Scale table based on provided width & depth
    local nWidth2Pos = (nScaleWidth - 1) * 18
    local nDepth2Pos = (nScaleDepth - 1) * 18

    -- Aspect ratio - scale
    local vAspect = tostring(Util.round(nScaleWidth / nScaleDepth, 2))
    local fFindButton = function(obj) return obj.click_function == "click_scaleAR" end
    local oButton = Util.find(oPanel_TC, fFindButton)
    if oButton then oPanel_TC.editButton({index=oButton.index, label="Current AR: "..vAspect}) end

    -- Move/scale hand zones if enabled
    if tTableData_TC.move or tTableData_TC.scale then
        local tHands = Hands.getHands()
        if #tHands > 0 then
            for _, obj in ipairs(tHands) do tc.moveHand(obj, nWidth2Pos, nDepth2Pos, nScaleWidth) end
        end
    end

    -- Resize table pieces
    oRailTop_TC.setScale({nScaleWidth, 1, 1})
    oRailBottom_TC.setScale({nScaleWidth, 1, 1})
    oRailLeft_TC.setScale({nScaleDepth, 1, 1})
    oRailRight_TC.setScale({nScaleDepth, 1, 1})
    oSurface_TC.setScale({nScaleWidth, 1, nScaleDepth})

    -- Reposition pieces
    oRailLeft_TC.setPosition({-nWidth2Pos, nHeightOffset_TC, 0})
    oRailRight_TC.setPosition({ nWidth2Pos, nHeightOffset_TC, 0})
    oRailTop_TC.setPosition({0, nHeightOffset_TC, nDepth2Pos})
    oRailBottom_TC.setPosition({0, nHeightOffset_TC, -nDepth2Pos})
    oLeg1_TC.setPosition({-nWidth2Pos, nHeightOffset_TC, -nDepth2Pos})
    oLeg2_TC.setPosition({-nWidth2Pos, nHeightOffset_TC, nDepth2Pos})
    oLeg3_TC.setPosition({ nWidth2Pos, nHeightOffset_TC, nDepth2Pos})
    oLeg4_TC.setPosition({ nWidth2Pos, nHeightOffset_TC, -nDepth2Pos})

    -- Adjust the container's position relative to leg4 so that the table object remains aligned
    oPanel_TC.setPosition(oLeg4_TC.positionToWorld({-22.12, 8.74, -19.16}))

    -- Only enabled when changing nHeightOffset_TC
    -- oSurface_TC.setPosition({0, nHeightOffset_TC, 0})
end

function tc.moveHand(oZone, nWidth2Pos, nDepth2Pos, nScaleWidth) -- Move hands when table is scaled
    local nWidthX = oRailRight_TC.getPosition().x
    local nDepthZ = oRailTop_TC.getPosition().z
    local nScaleFactor = nScaleWidth / oRailTop_TC.getScale().x

    -- Objects in hand zone
    for _, obj in ipairs(oZone.getObjects(true)) do
        if obj.hasTag("HandZone_TC") then

            local tPos = obj.getPosition()
            local tRot = obj.getRotation()
            local tSca = obj.getScale()

            -- Determine whether object is oriented to Z or X axis and move accordingly
            local bZAxis = false
            if tRot.z < 45 then
                if (tRot.y < 45) or (tRot.y > 320) or (tRot.y > 135 and tRot.y < 225) then bZAxis = true end
            end

            if bZAxis then
                -- Table top/bottom
                if tPos.z > 0 then
                    -- Top
                    if tTableData_TC.move then tPos.z = tPos.z + nDepth2Pos - nDepthZ end
                else
                    -- Bottom
                    if tTableData_TC.move then tPos.z = tPos.z - nDepth2Pos + nDepthZ end
                end
                if tTableData_TC.scale then tPos.x = tPos.x * nScaleFactor end
            else
                -- Table left/right
                if tPos.x < 0 then
                    -- Left
                    if tTableData_TC.move then tPos.x = tPos.x - nWidth2Pos + nWidthX end
                else
                    -- Right
                    if tTableData_TC.move then tPos.x = tPos.x + nWidth2Pos - nWidthX end
                end
                if tTableData_TC.scale then tPos.z = tPos.z * nScaleFactor end
            end
            if tTableData_TC.scale then
                if obj.type ~= "Generic" then tSca.x = tSca.x * nScaleFactor end
            end

            -- Only enabled when changing nHeightOffset_TC
            -- tPos.y = nHeightOffset_TC + 14

            obj.setPosition(tPos)
            obj.setScale(tSca)
        end
    end

    -- Hand zone
    local tPos = oZone.getPosition()
    local tRot = oZone.getRotation()
    local tSca = oZone.getScale()

    -- Determine whether hand is oriented to Z or X axis and move accordingly
    if (tRot.y < 45) or (tRot.y > 320) or (tRot.y > 135 and tRot.y < 225) then
        -- Table top/bottom
        if tPos.z > 0 then
            -- Top
            if tTableData_TC.move then tPos.z = tPos.z + nDepth2Pos - nDepthZ end
        else
            -- Bottom
            if tTableData_TC.move then tPos.z = tPos.z - nDepth2Pos + nDepthZ end
        end
        if tTableData_TC.scale then tPos.x = tPos.x * nScaleFactor end
    else
        -- Table left/right        
        if tPos.x < 0 then
            -- Left
            if tTableData_TC.move then tPos.x = tPos.x - nWidth2Pos + nWidthX end
        else
            -- Right
            if tTableData_TC.move then tPos.x = tPos.x + nWidth2Pos - nWidthX end
        end
        if tTableData_TC.scale then tPos.z = tPos.z * nScaleFactor end
    end
    if tTableData_TC.scale then tSca.x = tSca.x * nScaleFactor end

    -- Only enabled when changing nHeightOffset_TC
    -- tPos.y = nHeightOffset_TC + 14

    oZone.setPosition(tPos)
    oZone.setScale(tSca)
end

function tc.checkInputs(vType, bApply) -- Confirm inputs for validity & scale table if indicated
    if vType == "Dimensions" then
        local tInputs = oPanel_TC.getInputs()
        local nImageWidth = tonumber(tInputs[3].value)
        local nImageHeight = tonumber(tInputs[4].value)
        local nScaleWidth = tonumber(tInputs[5].value)
        local nScaleDepth = tonumber(tInputs[6].value)

        if not nScaleWidth then
            if not bScaleDepth_TC then broadcastToAll("Missing or invalid scale width", {0.9, 0.2, 0.2}) end
        elseif not nImageWidth or not nImageHeight then
            broadcastToAll("Missing or invalid dimensions", {0.9, 0.2, 0.2})
            return
        elseif nImageHeight == 0 then
            broadcastToAll("Image height cannot be zero", {0.9, 0.2, 0.2})
            return
        end

        local nAspect = nImageWidth / nImageHeight

        if bScaleDepth_TC then
            nScaleWidth = nScaleDepth * nAspect
        else
            nScaleDepth = nScaleWidth / nAspect
        end

        if nScaleDepth < 0.1 or nScaleDepth > 12 then
            broadcastToAll("Calculated table depth is out of bounds", {0.9, 0.2, 0.2})
            return
        end

        -- Dimensions aspect ratio
        local vAspect = tostring(Util.round(nAspect, 2))
        --local vScaleDepth = Util.round(nScaleDepth, 2)
        local fFindButton = function(obj) return obj.click_function == "click_imgAR" end
        local oButton = Util.find(oPanel_TC, fFindButton)
        if oButton then oPanel_TC.editButton({index=oButton.index, label="Aspect Ratio: "..vAspect}) end

        -- Change scale?    
        if bApply then
            tc.scaleTable(nScaleWidth, nScaleDepth)
            --broadcastToAll("Based on image's dimensions, table depth set to "..vScaleDepth, {0.2, 0.9, 0.2})
            -- Update depth input field (editInput uses indices starting at 0)
            if bScaleDepth_TC then
                oPanel_TC.editInput({index = 4, value = tostring(nScaleWidth)})
            else
                oPanel_TC.editInput({index = 5, value = tostring(nScaleDepth)})
            end
        end
    end

    if vType == "Options" then
        local nScaleWidth = tonumber(oPanel_TC.getInputs()[5].value)
        local nScaleDepth = tonumber(oPanel_TC.getInputs()[6].value)

        if type(nScaleWidth) ~= "number" then
            broadcastToAll("Invalid scale width", {0.9, 0.2, 0.2})
            return
        elseif type(nScaleDepth) ~= "number" then
            broadcastToAll("Invalid scale depth", {0.9, 0.2, 0.2})
            return
        elseif nScaleWidth < 0.1 or nScaleDepth < 0.1 then
            broadcastToAll("Scale cannot go below 0.1", {0.9, 0.2, 0.2})
            return
        elseif nScaleWidth > 12 or nScaleDepth > 12 then
            broadcastToAll("Scale should not go over 12 (world size limitation)", {0.9, 0.2, 0.2})
            return
        end

        -- Change scale?
        if bApply then
            tc.scaleTable(math.abs(nScaleWidth), math.abs(nScaleDepth))
            broadcastToAll("Scale applied!", {0.2, 0.9, 0.2})
        else
            -- Scale aspect ratio
            local vAspect = tostring(Util.round(nScaleWidth / nScaleDepth, 2))
            local fFindButton = function(obj) return obj.click_function == "click_scaleAR" end
            local oButton = Util.find(oPanel_TC, fFindButton)
            if oButton then oPanel_TC.editButton({index=oButton.index, label="Current AR: "..vAspect}) end
        end
    end
end

function tc.applyConfig(vPlayerColor, tZoneColors, vType, nImageIndex, nScaleWidth) -- Apply table configurations
    local tEntry = tImageData_TC[nImageIndex]
    if not tEntry then return end
    bScaleDepth_TC = false

    Player[vPlayerColor].showConfirmDialog("Apply configuration:\n"..tEntry.name.."?\n",
        function(_)

            oSurface_TC.setColorTint({1, 1, 1, 1})
            tc.del("Hands")

            -- editInput uses indices starting at 0
            oPanel_TC.editInput({index=0, value=tEntry.name})
            if tTableData_TC.grid then
                oPanel_TC.editInput({index=1, value=tEntry.url1})
            else
                oPanel_TC.editInput({index=1, value=tEntry.url})
            end
            oPanel_TC.editInput({index=2, value=tostring(tEntry.width)})
            oPanel_TC.editInput({index=3, value=tostring(tEntry.height)})
            oPanel_TC.editInput({index=4, value=tostring(nScaleWidth)})

            tc.unhideTable()
            if tTableData_TC.grid then
                tc.applyImage(tEntry.url1)
                --tc.applyTTSGrid(vPlayerColor, nImageIndex)
                --tc.setupBoard(true, vSetupGridURL_TC)
                tc.del("SetupText")
            else
                tc.applyImage(tEntry.url)
                --tc.applyTTSGrid(vPlayerColor, nImageIndex)
                --tc.setupBoard(true, vSetupBoardURL_TC)
                createButtons_TC("SetupBoard")
            end
            tc.checkInputs("Dimensions", true)

            for _, vColor in ipairs(tZoneColors) do

                -- Hand zones
                local tPos = tPosHandZones_TC[vType][vColor]
                local tRot = tRotHandZones_TC[vType][vColor]
                local tSca = tScaHandZones_TC[vType]
                local oHandZone = Util.spawn({
                    Type = "HandTrigger",
                    Pos = tPos,
                    Rot = tRot,
                    Sca = tSca,
                    Call = function(obj) obj.setValue(vColor) end
                })

                -- Player banners
                if tGameOption_TC.banners then
                    tPos = tPosBanners_TC[vType][vColor]
                    tRot = tRotBanners_TC[vType][vColor]
                    tSca = tScaBanners_TC[vType]
                    Util.spawn({
                        Type = tBannerData_TC,
                        Pos = tPos,
                        Rot = tRot,
                        Sca = tSca,
                        Call = function(obj) obj.setColorTint(Util.toColorVector(vColor)) end
                    })
                end

                -- Hotseat buttons
                if tGameOption_TC.banners then                
                    tPos = tPosButtons_TC[vType][vColor]
                    tRot = tRotButtons_TC[vType][vColor]
                    tSca = tScaButtons_TC[vType]
                    Util.spawn({
                        Type = tButtonData_TC,
                        Pos = tPos,
                        Rot = tRot,
                        Sca = tSca,
                        Call = function(obj) obj.setColorTint(Util.toColorVector(vColor)) end
                    })
                end
            end
            tTableData_TC.config = vType
            broadcastToAll("Saved configuration applied!", {0.2, 0.9, 0.2})
        end
    )
end

function tc.applyTTSGrid(vPlayerColor, nIndex) -- Apply TTS grid
    local tParams = {}
    if Util.is(tGridConfig_TC[nIndex]) then
        tParams = {
            type = 1,
            show_lines = true,
            color = "Grey",
            opacity = 0.05,
            thick_lines = false,
            snapping = 2,
            sizeX = tGridConfig_TC[nIndex].size,
            sizeY = tGridConfig_TC[nIndex].size,
            offsetX = tGridConfig_TC[nIndex].x,
            offsetY = tGridConfig_TC[nIndex].y
        }
        for k, v in pairs(tParams) do Grid[k] = v end
        if bPrompt then
            --[[Player[vPlayerColor].showConfirmDialog("Enable & align TTS grid to grid image?\n",
                function(_)
                    for k, v in pairs(tParams) do Grid[k] = v end
                end
            --)]]
        end
    else
        Grid.show_lines = false
        Grid.snapping = 1
    end
end

function tc.hideTable(bHideTable, bBroadcast) -- Hide/unhide table if indicated
    local tColor = oSurface_TC.getColorTint()
    for _, gTablePart in ipairs(tPartGUIDs_TC) do
        if gTablePart ~= oSurface_TC.guid then
            Util.get(gTablePart).attachInvisibleHider("hide", bHideTable)
        end
    end
    if bHideTable then
        tColor.a = 0
        oSurface_TC.setColorTint(tColor)
        if bBroadcast then broadcastToAll("Table hidden!", {0.2, 0.9, 0.2}) end
        if bBroadcast then broadcastToAll("Black (Game Master) can see & unhide table", "Black") end
    else
        tColor.a = 1
        oSurface_TC.setColorTint(tColor)
        if bBroadcast then broadcastToAll("Table unhidden!", {0.2, 0.9, 0.2}) end
    end
end

function tc.unhideTable() -- Hide table based on checkbox
    local fFindButton = function(obj) return obj.click_function == "check_hideTable_TC" end
    tTableData_TC.hide = false
    local oButton = Util.find(oPanel_TC, fFindButton)
    if oButton then oPanel_TC.editButton({index=oButton.index, label=""}) end
    tc.hideTable(tTableData_TC.hide, false)
end

function tc.applyImage(vImageURL) -- Apply provided image to table
    local tParams = oSurface_TC.getCustomObject()
    ---@diagnostic disable-next-line: inject-field
    tParams.diffuse = vImageURL
    oSurface_TC.setCustomObject(tParams)
    oSurface_TC = oSurface_TC.reload()
    oSurface_TC.interactable = false
    ---@diagnostic disable-next-line: inject-field
    oSurface_TC.gizmo_selectable = false
    tc.checkInputs("Dimensions", false)
end

function tc.setupBoard(bMode, vImageURL) -- Create/destroy setup board
    local function cbSpawnBoard(obj)
        gSetupBoard_TC = obj.guid
        tGameGUID_TC.sboard = gSetupBoard_TC
        local oCustom = obj.getCustomObject()
        if Util.is(vImageURL) then
            oCustom.image = vImageURL
            obj.setCustomObject(oCustom)
            obj.reload()
        end
        createButtons_TC("SetupBoard")
    end
    if not Util.get(gSetupBoard_TC) then
        if Util.get(tGameGUID_TC.sboard) then gSetupBoard_TC = tGameGUID_TC.sboard end
    end
    if bMode then
        if Util.get(gSetupBoard_TC) then
            local oSetupBoard = Util.get(gSetupBoard_TC)
            local oCustom = oSetupBoard.getCustomObject()
            if Util.is(vImageURL) then
                ---@diagnostic disable-next-line: inject-field
                oCustom.image = vImageURL
                oSetupBoard.setCustomObject(oCustom)
                oSetupBoard.reload()
            end
            createButtons_TC("SetupBoard")
        else
            local oBoard = Util.spawn({
                Type = "Custom Board",
                Pos = {0, 1.5, 0},
                Rot = {0, 180, 0},
                Sca = {0.8, 1, 0.8},
                Call = function(obj) cbSpawnBoard(obj) end
            })
            oBoard.setColorTint("Black")
        end
    else
        if Util.get(gSetupBoard_TC) then
            local oSetupBoard = Util.get(gSetupBoard_TC)
            Util.del(oSetupBoard)
            tc.del("SetupText")
            gSetupBoard_TC = nil
        end
    end
end

function tc.imageIndex(...) -- Return if argument exists in image index
    if not tImageData_TC then return nil end
    for _, vParam in ipairs({...}) do
        for nIndex, tEntry in ipairs(tImageData_TC) do
            if tEntry.url == vParam or tEntry.url1 == vParam or tEntry.name == vParam then return nIndex end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function tc.configIndex(vConfig1) -- Return index of provided configuration
    for nIndex, vConfig2 in ipairs(tConfigs_TC) do
        if vConfig1 == vConfig2 then return nIndex end
    end
end

-- TIMER

function tc.timedFunc(vFunc, bState) -- Start/stop provided wait function
    -- Start/stop check for hand zone color change
    if vFunc == "checkHandZone" then
        if bState then
            if nHandZoneID_TC == nil then nHandZoneID_TC = Wait.time(function() tc.checkHandZone() end, 1, -1) end
        else
            if Util.is(nHandZoneID_TC) then
                Wait.stop(nHandZoneID_TC)
                nHandZoneID_TC = nil
            end
        end
    end
    -- Start/stop auto-draw cards timed functions (if setup done)
    if vFunc == "autoDrawCards" then
        if bState then
            if nAutoDrawID_TC == nil then nAutoDrawID_TC = Wait.condition(function() tc.autoDrawCards() end, function() return tGameData_TC.setup end) end
        else
            if Util.is(nAutoDrawID_TC) then
                Wait.stop(nAutoDrawID_TC)
                nAutoDrawID_TC = nil
            end
        end
    end
    -- Start/stop check if cards taken (draw new cards)
    if vFunc == "checkCardsTaken" then
        if bState then
            if nAutoCardID_TC == nil then nAutoCardID_TC = Wait.time(function() tc.checkCardsTaken() end, 1, -1) end
        else
            if Util.is(nAutoCardID_TC) then
                Wait.stop(nAutoCardID_TC)
                nAutoCardID_TC = nil
            end
        end
    end
    -- Start/stop check if draw pile(s) empty (refill)
    if vFunc == "checkEmptyPiles" then
        if bState then
            if nAutoPileID_TC == nil then nAutoPileID_TC = Wait.time(function() tc.checkEmptyPiles() end, 1, -1) end
        else
            if Util.is(nAutoPileID_TC) then
                Wait.stop(nAutoPileID_TC)
                nAutoPileID_TC = nil
            end
        end
    end
end

-- GAME OPTIONS

function tc.spawnBanners() -- Spawn player banners based on hand-zone position, rotation & scale
    local function cbSpawnBanner(obj, vColor)
        obj.setColorTint(Util.toColorVector(vColor))
        obj.interactable = false
        obj.gizmo_selectable = false
    end
    local nOffset = 0.5 -- Offset from hand zone position                    
    for gZone, vColor in pairs(tc.handGUID_Color()) do
        local oHandZone = Util.get(gZone)
        local tPos = oHandZone.getPosition()
        local tRot = oHandZone.getRotation()
        local tSca = oHandZone.getScale()
        if (tRot.y < 45) or (tRot.y > 320) or (tRot.y > 135 and tRot.y < 225) then
            if tPos.z > 0 then -- Top or bottom
                tPos.z = tPos.z - nOffset -- Top (z-axis)
                tRot.y = tRot.y - 180
            else
                tPos.z = tPos.z + nOffset -- Bottom (z-axis)
                tRot.y = tRot.y + 180
            end
        else
            if tPos.x < 0 then -- Left or right
                tPos.x = tPos.x + nOffset -- Left (x-axis)
                tRot.y = tRot.y + 180
            else
                tPos.x = tPos.x - nOffset -- Right (x-axis)
                tRot.y = tRot.y - 180
            end
        end
        tSca.x = tSca.x / 6
        tSca.y = 1.00
        tSca.z = (tSca.z * 3) / 5

        Util.spawn({
            Type = tBannerData_TC,
            Pos = tPos,
            Rot = tRot,
            Sca = tSca,
            Call = function(obj) cbSpawnBanner(obj, vColor) end
        })
    end
end

function tc.spawnButtons() -- Spawn hotseat buttons based on hand-zone position, rotation & scale
    local function cbSpawnButton(obj, vColor)
        obj.setColorTint(Util.toColorVector(vColor))
        obj.interactable = false
        obj.gizmo_selectable = false
    end
    local nOffset = 1.6 -- Offset from hand zone position
    for gZone, vColor in pairs(tc.handGUID_Color()) do
        local oHandZone = Util.get(gZone)
        local tPos = oHandZone.getPosition()
        local tRot = oHandZone.getRotation()
        if (tRot.y < 45) or (tRot.y > 320) or (tRot.y > 135 and tRot.y < 225) then
            if tPos.z > 0 then -- Top or bottom
                tPos.z = tPos.z + nOffset -- Top (z-axis)
                tRot.x = tRot.x + 270
            else
                tPos.z = tPos.z - nOffset -- Bottom (z-axis)
                tRot.x = tRot.x + 90
                tRot.y = tRot.y + 180
            end
        else
            if tPos.x < 0 then -- Left or right
                tPos.x = tPos.x - nOffset -- Left (x-axis)
                tRot.y = tRot.y + 90
                tRot.z = tRot.z + 270
            else
                tPos.x = tPos.x + nOffset -- Right (x-axis)
                tRot.y = tRot.y - 90
                tRot.z = tRot.z + 90
            end
        end
        tPos.y = tPos.y - 1.7

        Util.spawn({
            Type = tButtonData_TC,
            Pos = tPos,
            Rot = tRot,
            Sca = {0.5, 0.5, 0.5},
            Call = function(obj) cbSpawnButton(obj, vColor) end
        })
    end
end

function tc.createButtons(vType)

        function_owner = Global,
        click_function = "none",
        label = "",
        tooltip = "",
        width = 400,
        height = 400,
        color = "White",
        font_size = 100,
        font_color = {0, 0, 0},
        --hover_color = "Grey",
        --press_color = "Black",
        position = {0, 0, 0},
        rotation = {0, 0, 0},
        scale = {1, 1, 1},
    }

    if vType == "Panel" then
        local vState = "Open"
        if bPanelActive_TC then vState = "Close" end

        -- Panel button
        tButton.click_function = "click_toggleControl_TC"
        tButton.tooltip = vState.." Table Control Panel"
        tButton.color = {1, 1, 1, 0}
        tButton.rotation = {-45, 0, 0}
        oPanel_TC.createButton(tButton)
    end

    if vType == "Image" then

        -- TITLES

        tButton.label = "Image:"
        tButton.tooltip = ""
        tButton.width = 0
        tButton.height = 0
        tButton.color = "White"
        tButton.font_size = 300
        tButton.font_color = {1, 1, 1}
        tButton.position = {0, 0, 1}
        tButton.rotation = {0, 0, 0}
        oPanel_TC.createButton(tButton)

        -- Configurations title
        tButton.label = "Configurations:"
        tButton.position = {0, 0, 5.5}
        oPanel_TC.createButton(tButton)

        -- Saved images title
        tButton.label = "Saved Images:"
        tButton.position = {0, 0, 10.75}
        oPanel_TC.createButton(tButton)

        -- BUTTONS
